_publications._publicationTitle: Cyclic AMP suppression is sufficient to induce gliomagenesis in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis-1.

_contextSnippet: Gliomas within the optic nerves of OPG mice (Figure 1C) contain bipolar GFAP positive astrocytoma cells (Figure 1D)... The diagnosis of an induced glioma was made when hypercellular lesions expressing mCherry fluorescent protein and PDE4 also contained GFAP-positive cells with the bipolar morphology
details: Successfully identified bipolar GFAP positive astrocytoma cells in optic nerve gliomas and induced cortical tumors
